attributes.description: AHCL has been manufacturing ayurvedic balm for pain management since 1893, and is currently managed by the third-generation of promoters. The company is more than 120 years old and is into OTC products in the segments of pain management, women's hygiene, and packaged fruit juice drink. [1]
